mapper.select: SELECT a.id AS id, a.id AS assetId, a.asset_code AS assetCode, a.asset_name AS assetName, CONCAT('低净值资产：', a.asset_name, '（净值率 ', ROUND(a.net_value / a.original_value * 100, 2), '%）') AS title, CONCAT('资产编号 ', a.asset_code, '，原值 ', a.original_value, ' 元，净值 ', a.net_value, ' 元，净值率低于 20%') AS description, '建议评估资产是否需要报废或调拨' AS suggestion FROM asset a WHERE a.deleted = 0 AND a.status NOT IN ('SCRAPPED') AND a.original_value > 0 AND a.net_value / a.original_value <= 0.2 ORDER BY a.net_value / a.original_value ASC

SELECT a.id AS id, a.id AS assetId, a.asset_code AS assetCode, a.asset_name AS assetName, CONCAT('接近使用年限：', a.asset_name, '（剩余 ', a.useful_life * 12 - PERIOD_DIFF(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m'), DATE_FORMAT(a.purchase_date, '%Y%m')), ' 个月）') AS title, CONCAT('资产编号 ', a.asset_code, '，购置日期 ', DATE_FORMAT(a.purchase_date, '%Y-%m-%d'), '，使用年限 ', a.useful_life, ' 年，剩余使用时间不足 6 个月') AS description, '建议安排资产报废评估或续用审批' AS suggestion FROM asset a WHERE a.deleted = 0 AND a.status NOT IN ('SCRAPPED') AND a.useful_life IS NOT NULL AND a.purchase_date IS NOT NULL AND a.useful_life * 12 - PERIOD_DIFF(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m'), DATE_FORMAT(a.purchase_date, '%Y%m')) < 6 ORDER BY a.useful_life * 12 - PERIOD_DIFF(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m'), DATE_FORMAT(a.purchase_date, '%Y%m')) ASC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT a.id AS id, a.id AS assetId, a.asset_code AS assetCode, a.asset_name AS assetName, a.created_at AS assetCreatedAt, (SELECT MAX(l.operation_time) FROM asset_operation_log l WHERE l.asset_id = a.id) AS lastOperationTime FROM asset a WHERE a.deleted = 0 AND a.status = 'IDLE' ) t WHERE COALESCE(t.lastOperationTime, t.assetCreatedAt) < #{thresholdDate} ORDER BY COALESCE(t.lastOperationTime, t.assetCreatedAt) ASC

SELECT r.id AS id, r.id AS businessId, r.asset_id AS assetId, a.asset_code AS assetCode, a.asset_name AS assetName, CONCAT('维修超期：', COALESCE(a.asset_name, '未知资产'), '（维修单 ', r.order_code, '，已超 ', DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), r.repair_start_date), ' 天）') AS title, CONCAT('资产编号 ', COALESCE(a.asset_code, '-'), '，维修单号 ', r.order_code, '，维修开始日期 ', DATE_FORMAT(r.repair_start_date, '%Y-%m-%d'), '，维修单状态 ', r.status) AS description, '建议跟进维修进度或安排报废' AS suggestion FROM asset_repair_order r LEFT JOIN asset a ON a.id = r.asset_id WHERE r.repair_start_date IS NOT NULL AND r.repair_start_date < #{thresholdDate} AND (r.status = 'DRAFT' OR a.status = 'REPAIRING') ORDER BY r.repair_start_date ASC

SELECT r.id AS id, r.id AS businessId, r.task_id AS taskId, r.asset_id AS assetId, a.asset_code AS assetCode, a.asset_name AS assetName, CONCAT('盘点异常：', COALESCE(a.asset_name, '未知资产'), '（', r.result, '）') AS title, CONCAT('资产编号 ', COALESCE(a.asset_code, '-'), '，盘点结果 ', r.result, '，任务 ID ', r.task_id, COALESCE(CONCAT('，备注 ', r.remark), '')) AS description, '建议核查资产实物状态并更新台账' AS suggestion FROM inventory_record r LEFT JOIN asset a ON a.id = r.asset_id WHERE r.result IS NOT NULL AND r.result != 'NORMAL' ORDER BY r.scanned_at DESC

SELECT f.id AS id, f.id AS businessId, NULL AS assetId, NULL AS assetCode, NULL AS assetName, CONCAT('财务同步异常：', f.sync_month, '（状态 ', f.status, '）') AS title, CONCAT('同步月份 ', f.sync_month, '，状态 ', f.status, COALESCE(CONCAT('，备注 ', f.remark), '')) AS description, '建议核查财务同步流程并重新执行同步' AS suggestion FROM finance_sync_record f WHERE f.status != 'SUCCESS' ORDER BY f.created_at DESC
